temporal_description: A medium shot shows a man with a serious expression standing in a dimly lit, green-hued room. He is wearing a black, loose-fitting garment. In the background, a window is covered with a metal grate. The camera slowly pans down, revealing that his right hand is in a white cast. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters are visible. The audio is filled with a low, ominous, and suspenseful ambient drone. The sound is deep and resonant, creating a tense and foreboding atmosphere, as if building up to a significant or dangerous moment. There is no dialogue or other sound effects, allowing the unsettling music to dominate the scene. The camera cuts to a close-up of an older man with short, graying hair. He looks on with a concerned and slightly fearful expression, his eyes wide. The background is out of focus, maintaining the same green color palette. The white Chinese characters remain in the top left corner.
